Who We Are

A Category of One

EightIndex Inc does not build apartments. We build ecosystems where residents live, work, and grow their businesses without ever leaving the property.

We identified a category gap no developer has filled at scale: the remote professional and entrepreneur who needs a registered business address, boardroom access, and corporate infrastructure — but refuses to pay separately for WeWork on top of rent.

The Nexus is our answer. Every unit includes a dedicated home office den. Every resident receives a professional registered business address. The Nexus Clubhouse delivers full corporate-grade infrastructure — all included in rent.

Connect With Us
01
Premium Revenue & Retention
Professional infrastructure commands 25–35% rental premiums and drives long-term tenant retention above market averages.
02
Viral Marketing Engine
Photogenic co-working spaces and rooftop terraces turn residents into brand ambassadors, generating organic demand and a perpetual waitlist.
03
Professional Network Effects
The Nexus Guild event series creates a career-accelerating environment that justifies top-of-market rents and unparalleled loyalty.
04
Institutional Exit Strategy
Category-defining NOI positions the asset for REIT acquisition or a favorable cash-out refinance at stabilization.
The Product

The Nexus Clubhouse

5,000+ sq. ft. of full-service corporate infrastructure. Included in every lease. This is not an amenity — it is a productivity necessity.

■
Private Offices
Bookable by hour or day. Soundproofed, furnished, enterprise-grade technology. Professional client meetings steps from your door.
◆
Board Conference Rooms
AV-equipped rooms seating 6 to 20. Perfect for investor presentations, team sessions, and client calls.
○
Content Creation Suite
Professional podcast studio, ring light setups, green screen, and broadcast-quality equipment for the creator economy.
△
Registered Business Address
Every resident receives a professional registered business address, mail handling, and notary services — included in rent.
㛆
Nexus Guild Events
Monthly speaker series, investor mixers, founder masterminds, and networking events. The property is a career accelerator.
◇
Enterprise Technology
High-speed fiber internet, rooftop workstations, smart building systems, and photogenic spaces built for productivity.

Leadership

The Team

Experienced leadership executing a category-defining vision.

Gregory Denis
President & Chief Executive Officer

Seasoned project superintendent specializing in high-end custom builds and complex commercial facilities. Expert in budget adherence, accelerated timelines, and meticulous blueprint execution to deliver exceptional quality for discerning clients. Visionary founder of EightIndex Inc and architect of The Nexus concept.

St. Johns County FL School District
Target Tenant Profile
  • Remote professionals: software developers, consultants, digital marketers
  • Entrepreneurs & founders: e-commerce operators, freelancers, service businesses
  • Side-hustlers transitioning to full-time business ownership
  • Ages 28–45, high disposable income, values community and professional growth
  • Combined rent + WeWork cost exceeds The Nexus rent — clear value proposition
  • Fastest-growing rental demographic in the United States
Why St. Augustine / St. Johns County
  • Florida's fastest-growing county — 18%+ population growth over 5 years
  • Florida's #1 ranked public school district, attracting high-income families
  • Median household income $95,000+ in zip code 32092
  • Severe shortage of Class-A rental product serving professional tenants
  • Strong remote worker migration from Miami, Atlanta, and New York
  • Pro-development county government, streamlined entitlement process
  • 30 minutes from Jacksonville International Airport
